title: Simple Arithmetic
description: You are given three integers a, b, c (1 ≤ a, b, c ≤ 109). Compute a⋅b/c, with an absolute precision of 10−6.
input: The first and only line of input contains the three integers a, b, c separated by a single space.
output: Output a single floating point number. It must differ from a⋅b/c by at most 10−6 in absolute value, i.e., it should obey |x−a⋅b/c| ≤ 10−6.
source: , Olympiad, Baltic Olympiad in Informatics, BOI 2018 연습 세션, jh05013
